title: Moon Cat receives Full Moon stat effects

card.rawText: This card inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature with "Were" in its name. It also receives the effects of the "Full Moon" magic card.

effect.value: AL ADD 5; HIT_DICE_ROLLS ADD 1; ATK_DICE_ROLLS ADD 1

plan.title: Moon Cat receives Full Moon stat effects
plan.summary: Verify Moon Cat receives the Full Moon AL and Atk Dice Roll bonuses from its own printed effect.

notes: This fixture covers Moon Cat's printed Full Moon self-buff, not the Were-target damage multiplier.

steps: Set Moon Cat as player_1 primary and Test Creature Defender as player_2 primary.
Read Moon Cat's effective AL and attack dice.

expectedAssertions.label: Moon Cat attack dice increased by 1

manualVerification: Confirm whether this self-buff should require the Full Moon field card to be active; current card metadata applies it directly while Moon Cat is on field.
Hit Dice Roll bonus needs a separate runner route because creature stat-modifier fixtures otherwise trigger duplicate combat.
riskNotes: This fixture follows the current card source, which hard-codes Full Moon effects onto Moon Cat.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Moon Cat's Full Moon stat self-buff.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
